enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual life update vlog covering two days: yard/house work including helping at three houses and a long bike ride (~10 miles each way), helping his mom clear plants around her rose bushes, watching Orange Is the New Black, and working on a cricket enclosure system for his reptiles. He also shares plans for his website and future reptile acquisitions.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Finds it really entertaining; calls the casting brilliant
Enthusiastic; planning to expand his collection when finances allow

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-LOG for the 13th, I guess, yesterday and the 11th because I forgot to do a V-LOG
Yesterday in the morning, totally spaced it, and then in the afternoon I wasn't home until like 9 and
I was just too tired and stoned and stuff, so
What did I do the day before yesterday?
I think it was three houses and then I mowed a lawn
And yesterday I rode out to Longmont
And then I obviously worked on my website when I got home, and then yesterday I worked out in Longmont in the morning
And it looked like it was going to rain, so I rode my bike all the way back
It was like 10 miles out and 10 miles back, and then it turned out it stopped raining
So then we went out, I built part of my little cone and then we went and did another place
And then I went over and reorganized the furniture and the lawn I did the other day because I forgot
And then I went over to my mom's house and dug up like all these plants around her rose bushes that were like
Cleaning clings of a rose bush and stuff and then had dinner there
I saw a couple episodes of that TV show, my mom's really into it
Orange is the New Black, it's really entertaining, the casting is brilliant in that
Yeah, and then came home and now I'm tired, I have to ride like 8 miles away or something
But I'm ready for the weekend, when I come home from work, I'll just work on my website
And then all weekend long
And got more crickets, I got six more of these guys, six more crickies, containers, because I get a thousand crickets from the
From this new company I'm getting crickets from
And then I built my little cone thing, I dump them in there and then they fall in, it makes it easy
I can do it myself, some couple escape, I've got a couple running around my house
But it's pretty chill
Then I can get more different reptiles when I have the money, like next year
Get a chameleon, and a bearded dragon, and maybe a guinea pig, and birds
And put like, plastic, um, leaves all over my room to make it look like a jungle
Oh, and then maybe even a humidifier
That'd be groovy
Okay, anyways, I guess that's all, that's it for now
Uh, peace out
